items.title: Copy Less, Ground More: Overcoming Repetitive Copying in Long-Context Reasoning via Evidence-Aware Reinforcement Learning
items.title_cn: 少复制，多拓展：通过循证强化学习克服长语境推理中的重复复制
items.summary: Large language models that generate step-by-step reasoning traces have achieved strong performance on complex tasks, and extending them to long-context settings has emerged as an important frontier. However, we identify a critical failure mode in this regime: \emph{repetitive copying}, where models ...
items.summary_cn: 生成逐步推理轨迹的大型语言模型在复杂任务上取得了强大的性能，并将其扩展到长语境设置已成为一个重要的前沿领域。但是，我们在此方案中确定了一种关键故障模式：\ emph {重复复制} ，其中模型...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Appearance Pointers -- Multimodal Region Control of Diffusion Transformers
items.title_cn: 外观指针--扩散变压器多模态区域控制
items.summary: Controllable image generation remains challenging for creative professionals, who often require precise regional control over materials, object identities, and spatial arrangements that cannot be reliably achieved through text prompting alone. Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) can natively ingest hetero...
items.summary_cn: 对于创意专业人士来说，可控图像生成仍然具有挑战性，他们通常需要对材料、对象身份和空间安排进行精确的区域控制，而仅靠文本提示无法可靠地实现这些控制。扩散变压器（ DiT ）可以原生摄取异质...
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，但别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: CodeRescue: Budget-Calibrated Recovery Routing for Coding Agents
items.title_cn: CodeRescue ：编码代理的预算校准恢复路由
items.summary: Coding agents increasingly operate in executable environments where a failed attempt produces actionable feedback rather than merely an incorrect answer. Existing cost-aware systems typically treat such failures as cascade decisions: try a cheap model first, then escalate hard cases to a stronger an...
items.summary_cn: 编码代理越来越多地在可执行环境中运行，其中失败的尝试会产生可操作的反馈，而不仅仅是错误的答案。现有的成本感知系统通常将此类故障视为级联决策：首先尝试廉价模型，然后将困难案例升级到更强大的...
items.comment: 又是一个'史上最强'，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。
